about.bio:
I work across the full stack, from embedded systems and Linux kernel to cloud infrastructure and AI agents. I write mostly Rust, TypeScript, and Python.

You might know me as the creator of [CyanogenMod](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/CyanogenMod) (now [LineageOS](https://lineageos.org/)), the largest open-source Android distribution. Millions of people used it to take control of their devices. I co-founded the company behind it.

These days I build open-source developer tools, terminal interfaces, design systems, and AI agent infrastructure. I care about software that respects its users and code that's genuinely fun to work with.

When I'm not writing code, I'm roller skating, spinning fire (levitation wand), producing electronic music, or tinkering with smart home hardware. Everything's on [GitHub](https://github.com/hyperb1iss).
